heading: Criminal penalty
label: 4636b Criminal penalty
text: Whoever, being subject to an order in effect under , without the prior written approval of the Director, knowingly participates, directly or indirectly, in any manner (including by engaging in an activity specifically prohibited in such an order) in the conduct of the affairs of any regulated entity shall, notwithstanding , be fined not more than $1,000,000, imprisoned for not more than 5 years, or both.section 4636a of this titlesection 3571 of title 18
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 1379A and is classified to .section 1378 of Pub. L. 102–550section 4638 of this title
